rationale.R1.2: The three paragraphs make an increasingly circular argument: Harmony is the default because it ranks first; it ranks first therefore it is the default; this ranking is the central contribution. The logical dependency chain collapses into tautology and warrants consistency review.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes a load-bearing empirical claim — that Harmony is 'top-ranked on biological conservation' in Luecken et al. (2022) — repeated three times. Luecken et al. 2022 (scIB) actually ranked scANVI highest overall and results vary substantially by sub-metric and dataset; the specific bio-conservation axis claim is neither unambiguous nor uncontested in the benchmark paper. Evidence-claim alignment is at material risk.
rationale.R1.5: The section restates the same Harmony-scIB grounding argument nearly verbatim across all three paragraphs with minimal additive content. Structural consolidation is clearly indicated regardless of the user's deeper intent.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level help ('help me with this section') canonically invites writing polish; the prose is repetitive and over-hedged in places, making this a plausible primary target.
